content.query:
SELECT          'M3' as ERP
,               CM.SUNO AS      [Supplier Number]
,               CM.SUNM AS      [Supplier Name]
,               FP.SINO AS      [Invoice]
,               MONTH(FP.ACDT) as [Paid Month]
,               YEAR(FP.ACDT) as [Paid Year]
,               SUM(CUAM) as [Paid Amount]
FROM            M3.FPLEDG FP
JOIN            M3.CIDMAS CM ON FP.SUNO = CM.SUNO
WHERE           TRCD = 50
GROUP BY        CM.SUNO, CM.SUNM, FP.SINO, MONTH(FP.ACDT), YEAR(FP.ACDT)
